name: Westerkwartier (Netherlands)
description: A geometric field of white with lime-green and light-blue shapes, bearing the municipal logo and the name 'Gemeente Westerkwartier'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Westerkwartier in the west of the province of Groningen, formed in 2019 from Grootegast, Leek, Marum and Zuidhorn. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: a lime-green shape at the hoist
a light-blue chevron from the fly
the municipal logo and wordmark 'Gemeente Westerkwartier'
